name: Self Credit Builder + Secured Visa

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. This is a secured credit-builder card.

earning_rates.notes: No rewards — this card does not earn cash back or points. Purpose is credit-building, not rewards.

other_benefits.name: Credit building
other_benefits.description: Reports to all three major credit bureaus (TransUnion, Equifax, Experian) monthly

other_benefits.name: Credit limit
other_benefits.description: Credit limit equal to security deposit ($300–$1,000 minimum)

other_benefits.name: Path to upgrade
other_benefits.description: On-time payments can lead to credit limit increases and graduation to unsecured card

notes: The Self Secured Visa is a credit-builder card that requires a security deposit (minimum $300). $0 annual fee for the first year for new customers; $25 annual fee thereafter. Variable APR of 27.49%. No rewards offered — this is purely a credit-building tool. Also available as a credit-builder loan + card combo product (Self Credit Builder Account). Reports to all three bureaus. High approval rate for those with limited credit.
